title: Vaseeswarar Temple
tagline: Vaseeswarar Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Vaseeswarar Temple (also called Pasoornathar Temple, Thirupasoor temple) is a Hindu temple dedicated to the deity Shiva, located in Thirupasoor, a village in Tiruvallur district in
overview.description: Vaseeswarar Temple (also called Pasoornathar Temple, Thirupasoor temple) is a Hindu temple dedicated to the deity Shiva, located in Thirupasoor, a village in Tiruvallur district in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Shiva is worshiped as Vaseeswarar, and is represented by the lingam. His consort Parvati is depicted as Pasupathinayagi. The temple is located on the Southern banks of Poondi reservoir on the Thiruvallur - Thiruthani road, 5 km (3.1 mi) away from the town.

topPlaces.name: Kaivandur
topPlaces.description: Kaivandur is a village in Tiruvallur district, Tamil Nadu, India. It is located between the town of Thiruvallur and the Thiruthani temple.

topPlaces.name: Tiruvallur
topPlaces.description: Tiruvallur is a Town in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu in Chennai Metropolitan Area. It is located on the banks of Coovum river about 45 km (28 mi) from downtown Chennai (Madras) in the western part of the Chennai Metropolitan Area (CMA).

topPlaces.name: Kadambathur block
topPlaces.description: Kadambathur block is a revenue block in the Tiruvallur district of Tamil Nadu, India. It has a total of 43 panchayat villages.

topPlaces.name: Kadambathur
topPlaces.description: Kadambathur, also spelt Kadambattur, is a town located in Tiruvallur district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is a census town in Tiruvallur taluk.

topPlaces.name: Poondi reservoir
topPlaces.description: Sathyamoorthy Saagar, also known as Poondy Reservoir, is the reservoir constructed across Kotralai (alias) Kosasthalai River in Tiruvallur district of Tamil Nadu state in India. It acts as the important drinking water source for Chennai Municipal Corporation which is located 60 km away from the lake.

topPlaces.name: Gudiyam Cave
topPlaces.description: Gudiyam Caves are rock shelters in South India and known for prehistoric stone tools and culture. They were first identified by British geologist Robert Bruce Foote.

topPlaces.name: Vengathur
topPlaces.description: Vengathur is a census town in Thiruvallur district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Putlur Angala Parameshwari Amman Temple
topPlaces.description: Putlur Angala Parameshwari Amman Temple, also known as the Putlur Amman Temple, is a Hindu temple in Putlur, a village located within the Chennai Metropolitan Area, India. The temple is dedicated to the Hindu god Angala Parameshwari, an incarnation of Parvati, who is believed to have taken the form of a large anthill resembling a pregnant woman.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Vaseeswarar Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Vaseeswarar Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Vaseeswarar Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Chennai International Airport (36 km) and the nearest railway station is Chennai Central (44 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Vaseeswarar Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Vaseeswarar Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Vaseeswarar Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Vaseeswarar Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Vaseeswarar Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kaivandur, Tiruvallur, Kadambathur block, Kadambathur, Poondi reservoir.
